description: The hospital is joining a national Health Information Exchange (HIE) program. As the IT administrator, create a new Patient Identifier Type in OpenMRS (https://localhost/openmrs/admin/index.htm) named 'National Health ID' with the description 'Unique national health identifier issued by the Ministry of Health for the Health Information Exchange program'. Use the credentials 'superman' and 'Admin123' if prompted. Leave all other fields at their defaults.
